message:
test(harness): add editor golden snapshot tests

Comprehensive snapshot testing for Advanced Text Editor widget covering:

Cursor positioning:
- Single cursor at various positions
- Edge cases (start, end, middle)

Selection states:
- Single line selections
- Multi-line selections
- Word selection

Text operations:
- Insert, delete
- Undo/redo symmetry

Edge cases:
- Empty buffer
- Long lines
- Unicode grapheme clusters

Invariants enforced:
- Cursor always within valid buffer bounds
- Selection anchor/head form valid range
- Undo(redo(state)) == state
- Grapheme clusters handled as atomic units

JSONL structured logging schema documented for CI integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
